Dialog.name: MND_CARD_INFO_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The card in my hand is reacting...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_CARD_INFO_PRIESTESS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The High Priestess Major Arcana card[n]has been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_CARD_INFO_EMPRESS_EM
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Empress and Emperor Major Arcana[n]cards have been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_CARD_INFO_HIERO_LOVE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Hierophant and Lovers Major Arcana[n]cards have been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_CARD_INFO_CHARI_JUST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Chariot and Justice Major Arcana[n]cards have been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_CARD_INFO_HERMIT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Hermit Major Arcana card[n]has been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_CARD_INFO_FORT_STREN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Fortune and Strength Major Arcana[n]cards have been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_CARD_INFO_HANGEDMAN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Hanged Man Major Arcana card[n]has been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_CARD_INFO_VARIOUS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Multiple Major Arcana cards[n]have been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DETAIL_PRIESTESS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}High Priestess: {f 0 1 2}All-Out Attack{f 0 1 27} damage will increase until you leave Tartarus for the day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DETAIL_EMPRESS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Empress: The {f 0 1 36}En{f 0 1 27}, {f 0 1 36}Ag{f 0 1 27}, and {f 0 1 36}Lu{f 0 1 27} of Personas in your possession will increase by 2.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DETAIL_EMPEROR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Emperor: The {f 0 1 36}St{f 0 1 27} and {f 0 1 36}Ma{f 0 1 27} of Personas in your possession will increase by 2.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DETAIL_HIEROPHAN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hierophant: The {f 0 1 2}level{f 0 1 27} of your {f 0 1 2}currently equipped Persona{f 0 1 27} will increase by {f 0 1 2}1{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DETAIL_LOVERS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Lovers: Increases {f 0 1 2}Social Link bonuses{f 0 1 27} for Persona fusions until you leave Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DETAIL_CHARIOT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chariot: Your {f 0 1 34}maximum HP{f 0 1 27} will increase by {f 0 1 2}10{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DETAIL_JUSTICE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Justice: You will be able to {f 0 1 2}pick one additional card{f 0 1 27} from Shuffle Time until you leave Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DETAIL_HERMIT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hermit: Your {f 0 1 34}maximum SP{f 0 1 27} will increase by {f 0 1 2}7{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DETAIL_FORTUNE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fortune: All current party members' {f 0 1 34}maximum HP{f 0 1 27} will increase by {f 0 1 2}8{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DETAIL_STRENGTH
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Strength: All current party members' {f 0 1 34}maximum SP{f 0 1 27} will increase by {f 0 1 2}5{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_DETAIL_HANGEDMAN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hanged Man: Obtain {f 0 1 2}1{f 0 1 27} {f 0 1 39}Incense Card{f 0 1 27}, which {f 0 1 2}increases a Persona stat{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
